validation_queries.description: Check for RCCL Comm PMC descriptions (Send or Recv)
validation_queries.error_message: Did not find any RCCL Comm PMC descriptions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE name LIKE 'RCCL Comm%'

validation_queries.description: Check that RCCL PMCs have valid agent_id
validation_queries.error_message: Found RCCL PMCs with NULL agent_id
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE name LIKE 'RCCL Comm%' AND agent_id IS NOT NULL

validation_queries.description: Check for RCCL Comm events (Send or Recv)
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name LIKE 'RCCL Comm%'

validation_queries.description: Check that RCCL events have transfer_bytes in extdata
validation_queries.error_message: RCCL events missing transfer_bytes in extdata
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name LIKE 'RCCL Comm%' AND event.extdata LIKE '%transfer_bytes%'

validation_queries.description: Check that RCCL events have positive cumulative values
validation_queries.error_message: RCCL events have no positive cumulative values
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name LIKE 'RCCL Comm%' AND event.value > 0
